description: This is the interface area that can be filled with buttons, knobs, etc.

addVisualGuide.description: Creates either a line or rectangle with the given colour.

callAfterDelay.signature: void callAfterDelay(int milliSeconds, var function, var thisObject)
callAfterDelay.description: Calls a function after a delay. This is not accurate and only useful for UI purposes!.

createLocalLookAndFeel.description: Creates a look and feel that you can attach manually to certain components.

createPath.description: Creates a Path that can be drawn to a ScriptPanel.

createScreenshot.signature: void createScreenshot(var area, var directory, String name)
createScreenshot.description: Creates a screenshot of the area relative to the content's origin.

createSVG.description: Creates an SVG object from the converted Base64 String.

getAllComponents.description: Returns an array of all components that match the given regex.

getComponent.description: Returns the reference to the given component.

getComponentUnderDrag.description: Returns the ID of the component under the mouse.

getComponentUnderMouse.description: Returns the name of the component that is currently hovered.

getInterfaceSize.description: Returns an array containing the width and height of the interface.

getScreenBounds.description: Returns the total bounds of the main display.

isCtrlDown.description: Checks whether the CTRL key's flag is set.

isMouseDown.description: Returns 1 if the left mouse button is clicked somewhere on the interface and 2 if the right button is clicked.

makeFrontInterface.description: Sets this script as main interface with the given size.

makeFullScreenInterface.description: Sets this script as main interface with the given device resolution (only works with mobile devices).

refreshDragImage.description: Calls the paint function of the drag operation again to refresh the image.

restoreAllControlsFromPreset.description: Restores all controls from a previously saved XML data file.

setContentTooltip.description: sets the Tooltip that will be shown if the mouse hovers over the script's tab button.

setHeight.description: Sets the height of the content.

setKeyPressCallback.description: Adds a callback that will be performed asynchronously when the key is pressed.

setName.description: Sets the name that will be displayed in big fat Impact.

setSuspendTimerCallback.description: Sets a callback that will be notified whenever the UI timers are suspended.

setToolbarProperties.description: Sets the main toolbar properties from a JSON object.

setUseHighResolutionForPanels.description: Set this to true to render all script panels with double resolution for retina or rescaling.

setValuePopupData.description: sets the data for the value popups.

setWidth.description: Sets the height of the content.

showModalTextInput.description: Opens a text input box with the given properties and executes the callback when finished.
